text: Recent strategic initiatives, including the new $5 million Shop Small Grants Program building on the Small Business Saturday platform and presentations at the KBW Fintech Payments Conference 2025, demonstrate management's commitment to supporting small business growth and maintaining competitive positioning in the payments ecosystem. While the stock has recently reached an all-time high, revenue growth has exhibited variability across recent quarters, and broader regulatory developments in the payments industry, such as the Visa-Mastercard legal settlement, introduce ecosystem uncertainties. Given the combination of strong stock performance, revenue growth variability, and regulatory uncertainties, we believe current shareholders should maintain their positions while prospective investors may find better entry points on any pullback.

revision_history.original_text: Recent strategic initiatives, including the new $5 million Shop Small Grants Program building on the Small Business Saturday platform and presentations at the KBW Fintech Payments Conference 2025, demonstrate management's commitment to supporting small business growth and maintaining competitive positioning in the payments ecosystem. The company lifted its full-year guidance on strong business momentum, which provides some confidence in near-term performance. However, given the combination of elevated valuation following strong stock performance, revenue growth volatility, and regulatory uncertainties, we believe current shareholders should maintain their positions while prospective investors may find better entry points on any pullback.
revision_history.revised_text: Recent strategic initiatives, including the new $5 million Shop Small Grants Program building on the Small Business Saturday platform and presentations at the KBW Fintech Payments Conference 2025, demonstrate management's commitment to supporting small business growth and maintaining competitive positioning in the payments ecosystem. While the stock has recently reached an all-time high, revenue growth has exhibited variability across recent quarters, and broader regulatory developments in the payments industry, such as the Visa-Mastercard legal settlement, introduce ecosystem uncertainties. Given the combination of strong stock performance, revenue growth variability, and regulatory uncertainties, we believe current shareholders should maintain their positions while prospective investors may find better entry points on any pullback.
revision_history.changes_summary: Removed unsupported claim about lifted full-year guidance as no available chunk contains this information. Added citations to support stock performance (C026), revenue growth variability (C004, C009, C014, C019, K001), and regulatory uncertainties (C030). Retained valid claims about strategic initiatives (C031, C032) and investment recommendation.
